---
title: "Analytics Modeling From Scratch"
subtitle: "Formula-first walkthroughs for building intuition, code, and judgment"
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

Every walkthrough builds a modeling idea from the ground up. You see the
question the method answers, the formula it relies on, the R code that makes it
concrete, and the judgment calls that matter when the math meets messy data.

::: {.home-actions}
[Start with a goal](#choose-by-goal){.action-button .primary}
[Practice drills](#featured-practice){.action-button}
[Core demos](#topic-map){.action-button}
:::

::: {.home-snapshot}
::: {.snapshot-item}
**18**
walkthroughs and drills
:::

::: {.snapshot-item}
**R-first**
worked examples
:::

::: {.snapshot-item}
**Formula + code**
side by side
:::
:::

## Choose by Goal

Pick the job you are trying to do, then jump straight into the walkthrough that matches the modeling problem.

::: {.route-grid}
::: {.route-card}
**Classify observations**

Known labels, decision boundaries, and neighbor votes.

::: {.route-links}
[SVM](svm-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
[KNN](knn-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Check model performance**

Estimate how well a model handles data it did not see while training.

::: {.route-links}
[Cross-Validation](cross-validation-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Group unlabeled data**

Find structure from distances, centroids, and repeated assignment.

::: {.route-links}
[K-Means](kmeans-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Detect process shifts**

Accumulate evidence until a small change becomes visible.

::: {.route-links}
[CUSUM](cusum-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Forecast future values**

Work through trend, memory, and volatility in ordered data.

::: {.route-links}
[Time Series](time-series-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Predict or explain outcomes**

Connect variables to outcomes with linear and logistic relationships.

::: {.route-links}
[Regression](regression-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Transform features**

Reduce dimensions or reshape skewed variables before modeling.

::: {.route-links}
[PCA & Box-Cox](pca-boxcox-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Build interpretable rules**

Create decision paths from recursive splits and pruning.

::: {.route-links}
[CART](cart-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Choose variables**

Balance signal, bias, variance, and shrinkage.

::: {.route-links}
[Variable Selection](variable-selection-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Design data collection**

Compare treatments intentionally with tests, factors, and adaptive choices.

::: {.route-links}
[Design of Experiments](doe-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Simulate uncertainty**

Model queues, distributions, and steady-state behavior.

::: {.route-links}
[Simulation & Markov](simulation-markov-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Handle missing values**

Reason about missingness mechanisms before choosing an imputation strategy.

::: {.route-links}
[Missing Data](missing-data-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Formulate decisions**

Turn objectives, constraints, and variables into solvable models.

::: {.route-links}
[Optimization](optimization-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::

::: {.route-card}
**Recognize advanced families**

Build a practical map of methods you will see beyond the basics.

::: {.route-links}
[Advanced Topics](advanced-topics-from-scratch.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::
:::

## Topic Map

Use the full topic map when you want the complete formula-first walkthrough for a method.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Classification
- [**SVM From Scratch**](svm-from-scratch.qmd) — Maximum-margin hyperplanes and the kernel trick
- [**KNN From Scratch**](knn-from-scratch.qmd) — Majority vote among nearest neighbors
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Validation
- [**Cross-Validation From Scratch**](cross-validation-from-scratch.qmd) — Why testing on training data is cheating
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Clustering
- [**K-Means From Scratch**](kmeans-from-scratch.qmd) — Finding groups nobody told you about
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Change Detection
- [**CUSUM From Scratch**](cusum-from-scratch.qmd) — Catching the moment everything changed
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Time Series
- [**Time Series From Scratch**](time-series-from-scratch.qmd) — Exponential smoothing, ARIMA, GARCH
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Regression
- [**Regression From Scratch**](regression-from-scratch.qmd) — Linear & logistic regression
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Transformations
- [**PCA & Box-Cox From Scratch**](pca-boxcox-from-scratch.qmd) — Fixing your data before modeling
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Trees
- [**CART From Scratch**](cart-from-scratch.qmd) — If-then rules that think like humans
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Variable Selection
- [**Variable Selection From Scratch**](variable-selection-from-scratch.qmd) — LASSO, ridge, stepwise, and bias-variance tradeoff
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Design of Experiments
- [**DOE From Scratch**](doe-from-scratch.qmd) — A/B testing, factorial designs, multi-armed bandits
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Simulation & Markov
- [**Simulation & Markov From Scratch**](simulation-markov-from-scratch.qmd) — Distributions, QQ plots, M/M/1 queues, steady states
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Missing Data
- [**Missing Data From Scratch**](missing-data-from-scratch.qmd) — MCAR/MAR/MNAR, indicators, imputation strategies
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Optimization
- [**Optimization From Scratch**](optimization-from-scratch.qmd) — LP, binary variables, and why formulation is the hard part
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Advanced Topics
- [**Advanced Topics From Scratch**](advanced-topics-from-scratch.qmd) — Nonparametric, Bayesian, neural nets, game theory, survival, gradient boosting
:::

:::

## Featured Practice

::: {.practice-strip}
::: {.practice-card}
**Comprehensive Quiz**

Mixed concept checks with short explanations.

[Open quiz](comprehensive-quiz.qmd){.route-link}
:::

::: {.practice-card}
**Binary Choice Drill**

Precise true/false-style statements for fast recall.

[Start drill](binary-choice-drill.qmd){.route-link}
:::

::: {.practice-card}
**Confusion Matrix Cost Drill**

Calculate decision costs from false positives and false negatives.

[Practice costs](confusion-matrix-drill.qmd){.route-link}
:::
:::
